title: Show day of week In My Week
excerpt: My Week does not display the day of the week, only the date. This would be very helpful to include Monday, Tuesday , etc.

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml:
My Week does not display the day of the week, only the date. This would be very helpful to include Monday, Tuesday , etc.

image1668×967 127 KB

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree. The My week needs some love and small enhancements like this would help with the user experience of the My week

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! It’d be so helpful to be able to see the next week organized by day of the week.
